what_this_proves: The opt-in thinking-enabled ChatML renderer (bare assistant turn, no pre-filled <think></think>) makes Qwen3-8B emit its own reasoning block: both camelid and the llama.cpp reference begin with <think> for every probe.

Greedy generation is TOKEN-IDENTICAL to the llama.cpp reference for the full captured leading window (16 tokens/probe; no divergence within it). The window is host-bounded (see host_bounded), not divergence-bounded.
what_this_does_NOT_claim: Full token-parity over arbitrary-length thinking traces. The parity-locked exact-row support mode remains thinking-DISABLED; this lane is opt-in and bounded to the leading-trace envelope below.

comparator.fed: the bare-assistant thinking-enabled ChatML prompt via /completion

leading_trace_parity_envelope_tokens.note: host-bounded lower bound: all probes matched through the full captured window (16 tokens); not an observed divergence

probes.prompt: What is the capital of France?

divergence.note: no divergence within the shorter trace
no divergence within the shorter trace
no divergence within the shorter trace
no divergence within the shorter trace

host_bounded.reason: Qwen3-8B Q8_0 (8.1 GB) does not stay RAM-resident on this 16 GB host: the Q8 weight pages thrash the page cache and are re-read from the degraded T7 (~14 MB/s) every forward pass (~53 s/token measured), so a full 256-token x 4-probe trace is ~15 h. The GPU-resident lane is unavailable here ('GPU: none detected' - CPU-only in this environment), and the internal SSD has 3.8 GB free (cannot stage the 8.1 GB model). The leading trace was therefore captured to a bounded window of 16 tokens per probe.
host_bounded.what_this_means: Every probe is token-identical to the full llama.cpp 256-token reference across the ENTIRE captured 16-token window (no divergence observed within it). 16 is a host-imposed LOWER BOUND on the leading-trace envelope, NOT an observed divergence point. The full envelope is expected to be larger (cf. 1.7B 26-205, 4B 35-235) and remains to be captured on a host where 8B stays resident (a GPU-resident Mac, >16 GB RAM, or fast local SSD - e.g. the mini2 path used for the 8B thinking-DISABLED chatml-parity row).
